title: Advancement Overhaul
description: Adds new custom advancements and updates vanilla sorting.
body:
# 📜 Advancement Overhaul

**Advancement Overhaul** reorganizes Minecraft's vanilla advancements for better clarity and progression, and adds a variety of exciting new advancements to explore.  

- ✅ Vanilla advancements fully reorganized for improved structure  
- 🌟 Dozens of new challenges and rewards  
- ⚡ XP rewards for completing custom advancements  
- 🗺️ Adds Adventure, Nether, End, and Minecraft/Story advancements  
- 💡 Some advancements are inspired by BlazeandCave's Advancements Pack  
- 🔄 This pack will always be kept up-to-date with new releases  

> **Note:** Older versions of this pack will no longer be updated. Please use the latest release for full compatibility with Minecraft 1.21.9.  

**Installation:**  
Place the datapack in your world’s `datapacks` folder and reload your world (`/reload`).
